reason_not_included: readme states the database is distributed pre-built (deja_vu_database.db); DB-creation code was not shared

gsr.discrepancy_note: code only extracts channel index 0; raw XDF stream may carry more channels; not resolved without inspecting raw XDF directly

identity_assignment_evidence.participant_enumeration: directory listing of sub-P* under DATA_DIR (05_run_preprocessing.py:find_sessions_to_process)
identity_assignment_evidence.xdf_file_selection: largest file by byte size within the sub/ses folder (lib_preprocessing_utils.py:find_largest_xdf) - filename content never parsed
identity_assignment_evidence.preprocessed_hdf5_identity_source: function arguments subject_id/session_id, themselves sourced from directory path, not filename (lib_preprocessing_utils.py:save_preprocessed_hdf5)
identity_assignment_evidence.segment_hdf5_identity_source: SQLite database query 'SELECT DISTINCT subject, session FROM videos' (lib_segment_metadata.py:get_all_sessions), consumed by lib_segment_builder.py:process_single_session
identity_assignment_evidence.conclusion: no official code path reads subject/session identity from a raw XDF filename

trial_segment_structure_evidence.note_on_69s_vs_133s: the code's ~133s transition-duration validation window is a distinct quantity from the Zenodo description's '69-second neutral reset periods'; not reconciled here, stated as an open discrepancy
